name: InvestiGhost
summary: Step into a cartoon-inspired VR spook-fest!   As a paranormal investigator, explore haunted places, snap pics of cheeky ghosts, and battle big bosses.   Your W.A.L.R.U.S. gadget is a multitasking wonder: a ghost-detecting camera, plasma blaster, and more.  ⚠️ EARLY ACCESS: ⚠️  Includes 4 playable levels (Library, Coral Riff, Manor) & the Office Hub.   Upgrades and the photo gallery are in development.   Grab the game at a special early price and help our indie team finish this adventure!
